strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Proven ability to optimize performance and scalability in high-throughput systems (millions of requests/sec)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, the primary required backend framework
No direct evidence of working with Vitest, the required testing framework
Minimal cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) experience explicitly documented
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js expertise and AI-agent development experience, aligning well with core responsibilities. However, the resume lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js (primary required framework) and Vitest (required testing tool), and cloud platform experience is not clearly documented. The high-weight negative factor for primary stack misalignment significantly impacts the score despite other strengths.
